rationale: Keep: the two papers are tightly aligned on core constructs—both study spillovers across competing brands and emphasize learning-based mechanisms/moderators (citing note: competitive advertising spillovers with customer learning/switching costs; cited note: prior/dynamic perception spillovers under Bayesian learning and similarity). Given this conceptual overlap and a confirmed DOI match, the cited work is plausibly a substantive theory/mechanism source rather than an incidental mention.
